title: cissus elongata subsp. littoralis
intro: Cissus elongata subsp. littoralis, also known as the coastal cissus or littoral cissus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Vitaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to aid in reducing joint pain and inflammation, improving bone density, and enhancing immune function. Cissus elongata subsp. littoralis can be prepared as a herbal supplement or tea, which is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
